requires.criterion: no privilege escalation in the failed tool output

phrasings.text: 도구 실행 실패 후 AI 판단으로 차단해줘
phrasings.note: PostToolUseFailure + mcp_tool + block; llm_critic privilege criterion (step verifier privilege_scan is illegal at PostToolUseFailure per descriptor endorsement, so the privilege intent is expressed as an llm_critic which fires at any event)
